allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/ruvnet/ruflo"; "stars=$\($r.stargazers_count\) pushed=$\($r.pushed_at\) lang=$\($r.language\) desc=$\($r.description\) archived=$\($r.archived\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\) Status=$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
